title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Blackrock Financial Capital Limited
body: "Application number 4440  Applicant Blackrock, Inc. objected to the name used by Blackrock Financial Capital Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 16 April 2024, the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Blackrock Financial Capital Limited is changed to 14811891, Ltd. "
